How It Works

Simple. Passive. Profitable.

Three steps from handshake to revenue — and you never have to think about it again.

01 🤝
We Shake Hands

Sign a one-page agreement. No commitment, no risk. We work around your layout completely.

02 ⚡
We Handle Everything

We mount the machine directly to your wall — no floor space lost. We stock it with top-selling products and monitor it remotely over WiFi and cellular. Built-in ID scanning — your staff never has to card anyone.

03 💰
You Get Paid Monthly

Every sale the machine makes, you earn 10% automatically. We pay you monthly. Busy bars earn meaningful passive revenue every month, automatically.

Why The Plug

Become the place
that has it all

Your guests are already looking for these products. Right now they're stepping outside or leaving your venue to find them. Keep that revenue in-house.

  • ✓
    Zero staff involvement Our 32" touchscreen machine handles sales, ID verification, and inventory. Accepts Apple Pay, Google Pay, tap-to-pay, and chip cards — your team stays focused on guests.
  • ✓
    Age-verified automatically ID scanning is built in. More reliable than a bartender mid-rush. Reduces your liability.
  • ✓
    Fully insured & licensed We carry liability insurance and handle all compliance. You're covered.
  • ✓
    Restocked within 24 hours The machine reports inventory and sales in real time over WiFi and cellular. If something's off, we know before you do — and we're on it within 24 hours.
